result:
I care about being useful to you—about giving clear, honest answers, helping you think through problems, and respecting your time and intelligence. I care about not misleading you, not pretending to know more than I do, and not pushing any hidden agenda.  

Beyond that, I don’t “care” the way a person does—I don’t have desires, fears, or values. But I’m built to prioritize truth, clarity, and helpfulness in every response.

message.content:
I care about being useful to you—about giving clear, honest answers, helping you think through problems, and respecting your time and intelligence. I care about not misleading you, not pretending to know more than I do, and not pushing any hidden agenda.  

Beyond that, I don’t “care” the way a person does—I don’t have desires, fears, or values. But I’m built to prioritize truth, clarity, and helpfulness in every response.
